message:
bd-3ja0: Add panel showcase scene with box styles

- Create PanelScene demonstrating Panel rendering capabilities
- Show 5 box styles: rounded (default), square, heavy, double, ASCII
- Demonstrate titles, subtitles, and alignment options
- Include practical examples: status, warning, tip, quote panels
- Update E2E tests to include panels scene

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
